title: BYKITCHEN Air Fryer Parchment Paper Liner, 50PCS Square Air Fryer Liners Disposable, Greaseproof Paper, Compatible with COSORI, Ninja, Tefal, Russell Hobbs Fryers (Unbleached)
features: KEEP AIR FRYER CLEAN: No holes & specially designed with bowl shape, saves getting basket to greasey, and no residues. Keep sides & bottom of air fryer almost spotless. No need to wash after every use. They also make transferring the food to plate easier

PERFECT FOR 7IN-9IN AIR FRYER BASKET: 6.5 inch inner diameter & 8 inch outer diameter, height: 1.7inch, perfectly fit for air fryer basket/ steamer with inner size: 7inch to 9inch, compatible with cosori, Ninja, Tower air fryer and More. And 50PCS unbleached disposable paper liners, enough for home use
PREMIUM AIR FRYER SHEETS: Made from food grade pulp with food grade nonstick coating, healthy, nonstick, grease-proof, waterproof, non-absorbent, safe for daily use

HEAT RESISTANCE & EASY TO USE: Heat safe up to 450 degree F (232℃), Microwave and Oven safe. These non-stick disposable air fryer filters are all with bowl shape and exact size, no need cut or fold. Just put the paper liners in the basket and then throw into a rubbish bin after use

WARNING: 1.Do not put empty paper during preheating. 2. Ensure sufficient food covers at least 2/3 of the parchment liner. 3.Must be cautious to weight down all four corners with food. 4.The maximum heating time < 45 minutes
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Make Cleaning up Easier No holes & specially designed with bowl shape, and non-stick surface saves getting basket to greasey, and no residues. Food-safe & Non-fluorescent Made from 100% food safe pulp with food safe nonstick coating, healthy, 100% safe for daily use Non-stick & Oil Proof Waterproof, oil and grease proof Considerable Package Square paper liners are packaged in a clear box, which is dustproof and easy to take out. Cost-effective. Previous page Next page 1 Fire Alarm 2 Use Steps 3 Why Geting Burn Compare the Difference Air Fryer Liners Air Fryer Liners Air Fryer Liners Specification 50PCS-Square-16.5cm Specification 100PCS-Square-20cm Specification 100PCS-Square-23cm Fit For 3.5L-6L(COSOR1 3.5L/3.8L,Tefa1 4.2L) Fit For 5L-7.5L(COSOR15.5L/6.4L,PHILIPS 6.2L) Fit For 7L-10L+(Breville 10L,Tower 11L and Ninja Mini Oven) Why the parchment paper is at risk of catching fire？ The heating element is on top of the air fryer and when the air fryer is in use, air is circulated inside. If there is not enough food on the baking paper, it will be blown up to the top and come into contact with the heating element causing a fire. How to avoid the air fryer liner burn? 1.Do not put empty paper during preheating. 2. Ensure sufficient food covers at least 2/3 of the parchment liner. 3.Must be cautious to weight down all four corners with food. The video showcases the product in use.
